title: Draft
description: The writer -> gate handoff artifact (spec §9.2, §7.11): exactly three labeled variants plus self-declared metadata — the artifact the deterministic pre-gate validates (variant count/dup, length, formatting, placeholder, banned-pattern). N=3 variants is a fixed v1 contract (DD-11).

content_id.description: Content id this draft belongs to.

mode.description: Publish posture inherited from the originating operator command.

variants.description: Exactly three labeled variants (DD-11). The deterministic pre-gate enforces the count and duplicate checks.

text.description: The variant copy. For multi-part formats (e.g. threads) this carries the full body.

hook_strength_score.description: Writer's self-declared hook-strength assessment for this variant (self-declared metadata, not a gate verdict).

hashtags.description: Hashtags attached to the draft, if any.

alt_text.description: Alt text for an attached image/video, when present.

strongest_variant.description: The writer's self-declared strongest variant (a variant label). A non-binding signal; the gate seat performs the authoritative ranking.

notes.description: Writer's notes carried forward to the gate seat.
